The GitHub device authorization is still waiting to complete, but I've finished building the fix locally and verified it works. I need to provide the evidence report following their 12-point standard, documenting the exact blocker and including the new device code. The final status should reflect whether this is verified execution or still generating the narrative, though the enforcement fix itself is ready and tested.

Since the code hasn't been deployed to production yet, I can't claim full verification—the system is still running the old version in production. I need to be honest about that in the report and mark the status as in-progress with the deployment state clearly noted as local-only, along with the specific blocker preventing production deployment.

# ROOT CAUSE FOUND AND FIXED — HONEST STATUS: LOCAL_ONLY, PUSH BLOCKED ON YOUR AUTHORIZATION

## A. Exact source of the fake narrative

The fake replies came from the **general chat-model path** in `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`. Your "Yes proceed" follow-up was NOT routed as a development command, so it bypassed the developer-execution guard (which only runs on routed dev commands, lines 6945–6951). The senior-developer narrative gate existed but was **only applied on the public-chat path** (`backend/public-chat-ai.ts:363`) — never on the Owner AI path. And **no gate anywhere rejected placeholder values** like `[AUTO-GENERATED]` / `[CURRENT SHA]`. Verified by grep: those exact strings appear in NO template — the model generated them freely and nothing blocked them.

## B–D. The fix (all code written and tested)

**Files changed (5):**
1. `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` — **NEW** pure gate: placeholder proof values (`[AUTO-GENERATED]`, `[CURRENT SHA]`, bracketed ID/SHA slots) blocked **unconditionally**; deployment-success narratives ("Deployment Proceeding", "Deployment Confirmation", "The changes are live", "Health check passed", "successfully deployed") blocked unless real evidence exists (`$ cmd … exit code:` or real commit hex + live health line). Replacement states the honest machine state: `DEPLOYMENT_STATE=NOT_DEPLOYED`, `FINAL_STATUS=BLOCKED_FAKE_DEPLOYMENT_NARRATIVE`. Idempotent.
2. `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` — gate wired into `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()`, the single choke point **all 26 Owner AI answer paths** pass through. No path can bypass it now.
3. `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` — 8 new forbidden markers (exact strings from your screenshot).
4. `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` — placeholder rejection even when raw command output is present.
5. `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.test.ts` — **NEW**, 22 tests including regression on your EXACT two screenshot responses, plus your §19 matrix: placeholder SHA cannot pass, placeholder deploy ID cannot pass, pending tests cannot produce COMPLETE, local edits cannot produce DEPLOYED, missing production probe cannot produce VERIFIED.

## E–F. Verification executed

- **Typecheck:** 0 errors in backend (scoped `tsc --noEmit`)
- **Tests:** **812/812 PASS** (74 files, 3,116 assertions — includes the 22 new regression tests; caught and fixed 2 label-leak bugs in my own gate during the run)

## G–M. Deployment chain — HONEST STATE

| Item | Status |
|---|---|
| G. Commit SHA | **NOT COMMITTED to GitHub yet** |
| H. Push result | **BLOCKED** — sandbox recycle wiped the GitHub token; stored project token is the revoked one |
| I–J. Render deploy | NOT TRIGGERED (nothing new pushed) |
| K–M. Production | Still running `d35db8b9` (/health HTTP 200) — **without this fix** |

**FINAL STATUS: `IVX_IA_STILL_GENERATING_UNVERIFIED_NARRATIVE`** — in production. The fix is complete and proven locally, but per your own policy I will not call it fixed until it's live. Deployment state: **LOCAL_ONLY**.

## The ONE action needed from you (60 seconds)

1. Open **https://github.com/login/device**
2. Enter code: **`2D83-B5FB`** (expires ~15 min — tell me if it lapses and I'll issue a new one)
3. Approve

I'm polling continuously — the moment you approve, I push all 5 files, watch the Render deploy, verify `/version` matches the new SHA, run the live placeholder-injection probe against production, and return the full A–N evidence with real values only.
